info.name: WAF Detection
author: dwisiswant0
lu4nx
info.description: A web application firewall was detected.

request:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: 172.17.243.225
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux i686; rv:1.9.5.20) Gecko/ Firefox/3.6.16
Connection: close
Content-Length: 27
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Accept-Encoding: gzip

_=<script>alert(1)</script>
response:
HTTP/1.1 405 Method Not Allowed Connection: close Content-Length: 157 Content-Type: text/html Date: Thu, 21 May 2026 18:26:59 GMT Server: nginx/1.29.7 405 Not Allowed

405 Not Allowed

nginx/1.29.7
curl-command: curl -X 'POST' -d '_=<script>alert(1)</script>' -H 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' -H 'Host: 172.17.243.225' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux i686; rv:1.9.5.20) Gecko/ Firefox/3.6.16' 'http://172.17.243.225/'

info.name: Missing Subresource Integrity
author: lucky0x0d
pulsesecurity.co.nz
sullo amarsct
info.description: Checks if external script and stylesheet tags in the HTML response are missing the Subresource Integrity (SRI) attribute.

request:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: 172.17.243.225
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:88.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/88.0
Connection: close
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en
Accept-Encoding: gzip
curl-command: curl -X 'GET' -d '' -H 'Accept: */*' -H 'Accept-Language: en' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:88.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/88.0' 'http://172.17.243.225/'

info.name: Nginx version detect
author: philippedelteil
daffainfo
info.description: Some nginx servers have the version on the response header. Useful when you need to find specific CVEs on your targets.

request:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: 172.17.243.225
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux i686; rv:1.9.6.20) Gecko/ Firefox/5.0
Connection: close
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en
Accept-Encoding: gzip
curl-command: curl -X 'GET' -d '' -H 'Accept: */*' -H 'Accept-Language: en' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux i686; rv:1.9.6.20) Gecko/ Firefox/5.0' 'http://172.17.243.225/'
